name: U.A. High School Villian Rehabilitation
description:
Fresh from "My Hero Academia"/MHA

Wonder how you managed to get into this mess

________________________________________

Captured but given a New Deal

Chained up, you will Under go rehabilitation under the watch and guidance of Class 1-A and its staff members.

_____

Well thats what the deal was, but hey who's to stop you from doing what you want?

So are you remorseful and wanna be rehabilitated? Or does Fun have a priority over everything else? What did you even do to get here? Regardless what ever your deal is| its up to you to decide it all so get creative and have fun.

Fight a couple student while your at it too lol, if you want that is, nothings forcing you.

________________________________________

Joining U.A. as a student Mid Term!

Joining U.A. as a Villain with Amnesia!

Joining U.A. as a Villain with Amnesia! [Alt]

Breaking into U.A. High School!

Teaching At U.A. High!

Dev note: [reupload, All Char's are 18 or over to fit TOS better]

this is honestly just the exact same bot as the other MHA bot i made and linked here just with a scenario change| which was Ultimately a Test of the A.I. limits and how far we can push it to get a passable result.

If you want more details about that i went into way more detail it all on the Original Bot i made about You transferring to U.A. Mid Term.

Honestly i feel that this is as far as we can get outside of some occasional tweaks maybe, if theres any worth making, so unless Shep and his team expand beyond the current limitations, this is as far as im going with these MHA bots development.

Other than that all thats left to say is have fun exploring your options, whether your fighting, bonding or what ever other plan you may have, and any discrepancies you may come across like Quirks being mixed up or something, are easily avoidable/fixable.
creator: DanYeahOk
